Name: Noah
Text: First of all, diets need to be done slowly, without rushing.

Name: Noah
Text: If not, it can be dangerous for your health.

Name: Noah
Text: If you exercise regularly and eat healthy meals for breakfast, lunch,

Name: Noah
Text: and dinner while cutting back on snacks, you’ll lose weight.
Toast2: “If it’s hard to control your weight alone, you can consult a professional.”

Name: Man
Text: Hmm… Wait a minute. Let me ask ‘Eve.’

Name: Noah
Text: No, did you lose any weight following ‘Eve’s’ advice?

Name: Man
Text: No, but… I don’t feel comfortable making decisions on my own…

Name: Noah
Text: Your life belongs to you. You’re the one who makes the choice.

Name: Noah
Text: Just try following my advice for one week.

Name: Man
Text: Well… If it’s just for a week…
